| | Peter -- after coming up short in Alabama, it's no secret that out of state, dark-money donors are looking to buy another Senate seat. It's not even 2018 yet and their super PACs have already spent **$3.5 million on TV attack ads against Joe this year.** When all is said and done, experts predict as much as **_$100 million_** will be spent in the Indiana Senate race.

If these new ads are anything like what we've seen so far, the future's pretty bleak. Mitch McConnell and his Washington allies will stop at nothing to distort Joe's commonsense record of putting Hoosiers first. _What they 're saying just isn't true._ They don't think Hoosiers are smart enough to figure out what's real and what's a made up political attack.

name: The White House
subject: A new National Security Strategy for a new era
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9eb64fbeb1327fd3e8241d36c88ca8162efc98e598a6498935bf36a47fc19d0c88b7f1372e910cd7b84f64db5f902e2317574ccaee793f88

A new National Security Strategy for a new era

Today at 2:00 p.m. ET, President Donald J. Trump will speak from the Ronald Reagan Building and International Trade Center in Washington to unveil the National Security Strategy (NSS) for his Administration.

The NSS is an important milestone for any presidency. A statutorily mandated document, it explains to the American people, U.S. allies and partners, and federal agencies how the President intends to put his national security vision into practice.

What to expect: President Trump’s strategy arrives less than a year after he takes office and builds on 11 months of Presidential action to restore respect for America abroad and renew confidence at home. Its four core themes will sound familiar, reflecting key tenets of the President’s major foreign policy addresses in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia; Warsaw, Poland; and the United Nations General Assembly Hall in New York.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9eb64fbeb1327fd39b170e1a176c886628effbe9d4a198e15d3dea11aa35bec992ce34ee42091bd1cb7e92db8ad920859d1e06eb2c13ac55
Watch the President’s remarks here live at 2:00 p.m. ET.

The closing stretch for a major promise

When President Trump began his campaign, he promised that his Administration would push pro-growth economic policies that deliver financial relief to all Americans. With Congress’ release Friday of a conference report on the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, the President is on the verge of honoring that commitment in a big way.

By lowering rates, simplifying America’s tax code, and repealing a failed tax on lower- and middle-income households known as the Obamacare individual mandate, the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act will grow our economy and boost wages.

The President applauds the House and Senate conferees on coming to an agreement and looks forward to giving Americans a tax cut before the end of the year.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9eb64fbeb1327fd3d5e16ab4ff0c42ab1c984b37491b978f0cc5ed51badb74b2c6d72ec07c3ca333c0e7dead694d7f7c8d01bb0739f7223b
Read the President’s closing argument for tax reform.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump prepares to cut the “red tape” of regulations | December 14, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS TODAY

This afternoon, President Trump will give remarks regarding the Administration’s National Security Strategy at the Ronald Reagan Building and International Trade Center.

Later in the day, the President will meet with Secretary of State Rex Tillerson.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=9eb64fbeb1327fd37f1584202304fb90d2711bc1b9a3a7c4ba54111ea6cc59e4ec67147515a7d05c17a6f570a7f88aa27dc5c73eba031f5f

Jamming this reverse Robin Hood bill through the Senate and ignoring the voices of the nearly 4.9 million people in the state that elected Doug to the Senate is irresponsible and un-American, and we need to hold McConnell accountable for it.

name: Amanda Brown Lierman, Democrats.org
subject: MEMO: How we won Alabama
body:
Now it's time to replicate this success across the country.
---
Hi there, Derek. I'm Amanda -- the Political and Organizing Director here at the DNC.

Shortly after Jeff Sessions was confirmed by the Senate, Tom Perez and I sat down for a conversation with a little-known former U.S. Attorney from Birmingham. His name was Doug Jones, and he was mounting a longshot campaign to turn Alabama blue.

The moment Doug won the Democratic primary, we told him we would do everything we could to help. We believed in him, and we knew committed supporters like you would, too.

My team spent weeks on the ground in Alabama working with the campaign, and this election is another proof point for the importance of good organizing. The volunteers and organizers working on the ground made this victory possible.

**[Democrats can keep winning, but only if all of us stay engaged leading into 2018. Donate $3 or more today to help elect Democrats nationwide.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ed9/4067b0a/4fe9516da/7e5debc6/1762576568/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/ready-for-2018-AB?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+Democrats+can+keep+winning+but+only+if+a&utm_campaign=em_20171218_abl_nd&source=em_20171218_abl_nd&refcode=em_20171218_abl_nd")**

With your help, here are three things we did that made a huge difference in the Alabama race:
### 1\. Boots on the ground
We were on the ground early. We recruited organizers from the base communities that we needed to organize in, and they got to work recruiting volunteers, knocking doors, organizing rides to the polls, and getting out the vote on campuses. On Election Day, we had a diverse team of 30 embedded in the campaign and in the community -- and we knocked on 325,000 doors in just seven weeks.
### 2\. Investment in local leaders and programs
We knew African-Americans -- particularly black women -- and millennials would be key to victory, so we listened to leaders on the ground about how to organize those communities. We not only supported and amplified their programs, we put resources behind those leaders and programs. This included a program to mobilize black women in Jefferson County, to engage faith communities and religious leaders, and the #WeVote turnout campaign in north Alabama.
### 3\. Data infrastructure to win
In today's modern world, campaign data can make the difference between a win and a loss. We made a five-figure investment into the data infrastructure so Doug Jones had the voter contact information necessary to turn out voters. This data enabled us to run a full-scale digital program, including 1.32 million phone calls made and more than 1 million text messages sent.

**Now it's time to replicate this success across the country.** The new DNC is about making sure every ZIP code counts and that we are winning from the school board to the Oval Office. We know what it takes to win: boots on the ground, investment in local leaders and programs, and the best data infrastructure.

**[We are counting on your support to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. Chip in $3 or more today to help Democrats keep winning in 2018.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ed9/4067b0a/4fe9516da/7e5debc7/1762576568/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/ready-for-2018-AB?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+We+are+counting+on+your+support+to+elect&utm_campaign=em_20171218_abl_nd&source=em_20171218_abl_nd&refcode=em_20171218_abl_nd")**

clean_body: Now it's time to replicate this success across the country. Hi there, Derek. I'm Amanda -- the Political and Organizing Director here at the DNC. Shortly after Jeff Sessions was confirmed by the Senate, Tom Perez and I sat down for a conversation with a little-known former U.S. Attorney from Birmingham. His name was Doug Jones, and he was mounting a longshot campaign to turn Alabama blue. The moment Doug won the Democratic primary, we told him we would do everything we could to help. We believed in him, and we knew committed supporters like you would, too. My team spent weeks on the ground in Alabama working with the campaign, and this election is another proof point for the importance of good organizing. The volunteers and organizers working on the ground made this victory possible. "" With your help, here are three things we did that made a huge difference in the Alabama race: 1\. Boots on the ground We were on the ground early. We recruited organizers from the base communities that we needed to organize in, and they got to work recruiting volunteers, knocking doors, organizing rides to the polls, and getting out the vote on campuses. On Election Day, we had a diverse team of 30 embedded in the campaign and in the community -- and we knocked on 325,000 doors in just seven weeks. 2\. Investment in local leaders and programs We knew African-Americans -- particularly black women -- and millennials would be key to victory, so we listened to leaders on the ground about how to organize those communities. We not only supported and amplified their programs, we put resources behind those leaders and programs. This included a program to mobilize black women in Jefferson County, to engage faith communities and religious leaders, and the #WeVote turnout campaign in north Alabama. 3\. Data infrastructure to win In today's modern world, campaign data can make the difference between a win and a loss. We made a five-figure investment into the data infrastructure so Doug Jones had the voter contact information necessary to turn out voters. This data enabled us to run a full-scale digital program, including 1.32 million phone calls made and more than 1 million text messages sent. Now it's time to replicate this success across the country. The new DNC is about making sure every ZIP code counts and that we are winning from the school board to the Oval Office. We know what it takes to win: boots on the ground, investment in local leaders and programs, and the best data infrastructure. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" "" "" Thanks, Amanda Amanda Brown Lierman Political and Organizing Director Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. subject: She has always stood with us
body:
[](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff55/767134fb/5c0896c0/433812f7/766852474/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=em171218")

Sisters and Brothers,
When working people needed a champion, Donna Edwards was there fighting for us.
She stood with Local 25 members when we organized at the Gaylord hotel in National Harbor, and her unblemished record of supporting unions and progressive policies in Congress is exactly what Prince George's County needs as we look to the future. As hotel workers, our priority is to ensure that our next County Executive truly supports working people, and there is no better champion than Donna.
Let me be clear. This is more than just about our union. We work in the County, but we also live in the County. I am a resident of Suitland, Maryland. I got to see firsthand the type of leadership Donna brought to Prince George's County when she was in Congress. **She isn 't afraid to fight. See, here in Prince George's County, we like fighters. Because we know that working people haven't achieved anything in this country without fighting for it. Donna will fight for all Prince Georgians.**
**[Will you stand with us and make sure working people have a champion in their corner? Make a contribution to Donna's campaign here.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff55/767134fb/5c0896c0/433812f7/766852474/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=em171218")**
In order for Prince George's County to fulfill its potential, we need a County Executive with a fresh vision who puts people before special interests and developers. Donna is that person.
**We have a unique opportunity as a community in Washington D.C. 's backyard to send a message about what progressive government can do. We can take care of our citizens, and do it without ****caving****to special interests or big money donors.**
**[That's why we need you with us -- even $5 can make a big difference and shows everyone how powerful this grassroots movement behind Donna is. Click here to make your contribution now.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff55/767134fb/5c0896c0/433812f7/766852474/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=em171218")**
In solidarity,
Linda Martin, President

| Donald Trump made a huge mistake placing Michael Flynn in one of the most sensitive national security positions in the country. Now, Trump is beginning to feel the consequences of that lapse in judgment.

Flynn's indictment is the latest in a long string of breakthroughs coming in Robert Mueller's investigation into collusion with Russia. As Mueller's work moves forward, individuals with increasingly-close ties to Trump are being implicated.

This, obviously, does not bode well for the President. Trump doesn't want this kind of attention. Rumor has it that Trump may even fire Mueller before his investigation is complete.

We _cannot_ let that happen!

**Robert Mueller is conducting a fair and thorough investigation into Trump's ties to Russia, and he must be allowed to complete his work without interference from the White House.

subject: Tax scam

body:

Hello,

The Republicans' tax plan isn't about helping you -- despite what Mitch McConnell and Marco Rubio want you to think.

Last week, Rubio threatened to vote "No" on GOP's newest tax bill. He claimed he wouldn't vote for it unless a major change was made to the Child Tax Credit -- and while he got a fractional increase, we always knew he would cave to the demands of President Trump and Mitch McConnell.

Rubio once again gets to pretend he's not in the pocket of Trump and McConnell -- but the fact remains he voted for a bill that will destroy middle-class families -- and our economy from the bottom up. As usual, Rubio is just falling in line with the GOP's agenda to rip off millions of Americans.

**[Florida families deserve better. Add your name and join me to demand Rubio stand up, do what's right for his constituents and vote NO.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3234/9e00690/41c68bc0/2403d835/1061502873/VEsE/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/tell-marco-rubio-to-reject-the-gop-tax-bill?utm_campaign=em17_171218_GOPTax_fnd_gq_ful__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&source=em17_171218_GOPTax_fnd_gq_ful__AG&utm_content=2+-+Florida+families+deserve+better+Add+your")**

Florida's families deserve a tax system that doesn't disproportionately help giant corporations and private jet owners.

And this tax cut will be paid with the work equity of our teachers, firefighters, custodians, bus drivers, police officers, construction workers and the working class people of our state and country. It is a massive transfer of wealth from working families to the rich and it's time we call Rubio out on it.

**[Add your name now. Join me in asking Rubio to stand up and reject the tax bill for Florida families.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3234/9e00690/41c68bc0/2403d834/1061502873/VEsF/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/tell-marco-rubio-to-reject-the-gop-tax-bill?utm_campaign=em17_171218_GOPTax_fnd_gq_ful__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&source=em17_171218_GOPTax_fnd_gq_ful__AG&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+now+Join+me+in+asking+Rubi")**

We will remember this in November 2018.

Thank you,

Andrew

subject: 🛑 Republican plans for a constitutional convention
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6f81/24c69fd9/14e8563f2/18906b1c/3606183216/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEL29N_digital_email_20171218_ConCon_inact&source=WQEFEL29N_digital_email_20171218_ConCon_inact")
---

Peter,

Imagine what Republicans would do if given the chance to rewrite the Constitution.

It's unpleasant, but unfortunately, it's a real possibility.

Republicans control nearly enough state legislatures to call a constitutional convention, **without a single Democratic vote** -- they need 34, and they currently have 32.

To stop this possibility from becoming a reality, we have to invest heavily in state legislative races next year and start turning key chambers blue.

**[Donate $3 to help elect more pro-choice Democratic women to state legislatures to stop Republican plans to call a constitutional convention.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6f81/24c69fd9/14e8563f2/18906b1d/3606183216/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171218_email_ConCon?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+more+prochoice+De&utm_campaign=WQEFEL29N_digital_email_20171218_ConCon_inact&source=WQEFEL29N_digital_email_20171218_ConCon_inact")**

Republicans are already practicing rolling back hundreds of years of progress with mock conventions -- most recently in Virginia and Arizona.

But here's the good news:

Our women made huge gains in 2017. In Virginia, they won 13 seats in the House of Delegates, 11 of which flipped from red to blue. And in Georgia, our women broke up the Republican supermajority in the state Senate.

If we can build on those gains and replicate our winning strategy in state legislative races next year, we can stop this serious threat to our democracy.

**Donate $3 to help our women replace even more Republicans in state legislatures across the country and prevent the GOP from calling a constitutional convention:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Replace-Republicans-in-State-Legislatures](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6f81/24c69fd9/14e8563f2/18906b1e/3606183216/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171218_email_ConCon?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReplaceRepublica&utm_campaign=WQEFEL29N_digital_email_20171218_ConCon_inact&source=WQEFEL29N_digital_email_20171218_ConCon_inact")**

Thanks,

Jenna Kruse
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

Team,

The GOP is racing toward final passage of their sweeping tax scam bill -- and the House is expected to vote TOMORROW.

There's no question why Republicans are rushing this through: **A new _Monmouth_ poll says the tax scam has only a 26% approval rating.**

The American people do not want this bill -- but we are running out of time to get the word out. That's why our ads are up and running in key states to show Republicans the consequences they'll face in 2018 if they pass this disastrous scam.

[**Now, we need your voice. Add your name: tell Republicans not to support this tax scam before it 's too late.**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d00f/2b07114c/a8a9e629/731904dd/2655940923/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/stop-gop-tax-scam?source=PT-20171218-Vote_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

The bottom line: this bill is a rip-off for working families -- all to give the GOP's wealthy mega-donors a huge windfall. And there's still time to fight back -- but only if we act right now.

[**We have to show Republicans just how unpopular their tax plan really is. Add your name right now to tell the GOP you oppose the tax scam.**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d00f/2b07114c/a8a9e629/731904dd/2655940923/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/stop-gop-tax-scam?source=PT-20171218-Vote_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

Thank you,

Team DSCC

name: Justin Bamberg, Our Revolution
subject: Friends, I am here for political revolution
body:
I come to the board of Our Revolution as a South Carolina State Representative, trial lawyer, and civil rights attorney
#
Friends,
I come to the board of Our Revolution as a South Carolina State Representative, trial lawyer, and civil rights attorney who has worked my entire life in pursuit of justice. In January 2016, I took notice of Senator Bernie Sanders' presidential campaign and his message of social, racial, economic, and environmental justice. I knew then that the progressive grassroots movement that the campaign espoused would be the future of our country. Our work continues today.
My pursuit of justice has brought me to many challenging crossroads that we are grappling with as a nation. In my time as an attorney, I have represented the families of Walter Scott, Alton Sterling, Keith Lamont Scott, Albert Chatfield, and other victims of police use of force in civil court cases. Together with these families, activists in the community, and the teamwork of my legal staff, we have worked to overcome the institutional biases and barriers to hold police and local governments accountable and secure some modest restitution for families who have lost a loved one.
I know from experience how important it is that we have grassroots activists committed to justice in every community. Organizers just like you have independently formed more than 500 local groups under the banner of Our Revolution, and that organizing is paying off. In election after election, progressives, women, people of color, LGBT folks, and those of different faiths and countries of origin are building coalitions to propel them into public office.
My hope in working with you is to continue to build the grassroots to reform the Democratic Party and ensure that it is open to all people, not simply large campaign contributors and establishment insiders. We need solutions for the middle class and working people, and solutions start with ensuring that we have a seat at the table.
[**Will you join me in making a $5 contribution to Our Revolution to show that you are with us in this critical work? By everyone chipping in and working together, we have the potential to bring justice to every corner of this country.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7adf6/bed43eb/3d71e85a/75fe8f76/2139662362/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-organizing?refcode=em171218-full&noskip=true")
I cannot wait to continue our great work together in 2018. Thank you for supporting Our Revolution. We are honored to have you by our side.
In solidarity,
Justin Bamberg, Esq.
Board Member
Our Revolution
